0:
The Gold Saucer attendant is determined to see that you are duly rewarded for your efforts on his colleagues' behalf.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The Gold Saucer attendant is determined to see that you are duly rewarded for your efforts on his colleagues' behalf.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
The stern-faced attendant thanks you for your investigative efforts, which he learned all about from Ollier. He bids that you speak with Grege, his colleague who mans the entrance, to collect the gift that has been prepared for you by the Saucer staff.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
